question: Replace the neon sign reflection in the puddle with a reflection of a crescent moon.
Replace the Dalmatian with a running robotic dog.
Remove the red blanket from the grandmother's legs, revealing the blue jeans she is wearing underneath.
Remove the person with the green hiking backpack from the center of the frame.
Add a red folding beach chair in the center of the lawn, with the seat facing toward the right side of the frame.
Replace the classical guitar with a dark walnut cello, ensuring the musician's playing posture is naturally and realistically adapted to the new instrument.
Remove all pedestrians currently walking on the crosswalks, restoring a clean, empty intersection surface.

Insert 5 slender colorful birthday candles into the top tier of the cake (one each in red, blue, green, yellow, and purple), each candle topped with a small flame, with the candles arranged naturally in a gentle arc formation.
Replace all 5 red vehicles with 5 yellow NYC-style taxi cabs (sedan body type), maintaining the exact parking positions and orientations.
Remove the red umbrella from the pedestrian's hand (keep the pedestrian intact).
Add three white swans to the lake surface—one positioned center-left in the frame, and two placed further away on the right side.

Remove all white folding chairs on both sides along with the seated guests, and remove the officiant standing between the couple. Preserve only the couple, the wedding arch, and the rose petal decorations on the lawn.
Add a clear glass vase to the empty area on the left side of the desk, containing 3 tulips of different colors (red, pink, and yellow), with the vase filled with clear water.

Replace all the red apples on the top tier with an equal number of fresh Bartlett pears, replace the oranges on the middle tier with an equal number of ripe mangoes, keep the kiwis on the bottom tier unchanged.

Add a spectacular fireworks display in the sky: at least 5 distinct bursts of varying colors and patterns (including chrysanthemum, willow, and ring formations), with the fireworks creating colorful reflections on the river surface below.
Replace the orange tabby cat in the man's arms with a black and white Boston Terrier (small dog), while maintaining the cradled-in-arms posture.
Remove the 2 people on the far left of the front row and the 3 people on the far right of the back row (5 people total), ensuring the remaining group arrangement still appears natural.
Add a generous scattering of floating pink rose petals to the water's surface, with the petals naturally dispersed to cover approximately 60% of the visible water area.

Replace both lion-head door knockers with dragon-head knockers, replace the two knight statues with traditional Chinese guardian lion statues, and replace the three triangular pennants with Chinese-style red vertical streaming banners.

Completely remove the distant diver and their entire bubble stream, naturally reconstructing the water's volumetric haze, suspended particles, and distant coral/kelp silhouettes behind them so the image shows no trace of the removal. All foreground coral structures and every fish must remain exactly in their original positions and appearances.
Remove the person on the right side and fill in the background naturally
Remove all the other tourists, umbrellas, and that plastic bottle from the beach, leaving only the two of us
Bring some life to this street—park two vintage Volkswagen Beetles in different colors along the curb, and add a napping ginger cat on the nearest windowsill
Replace the book in his hands with a silver iPad
Replace all three throw pillows with deep navy velvet ones, and change the wall painting to a Monet-style water lilies composition
Great shot of the food truck scene but way too much clutter — remove the utility pole, the trash can, and that construction scaffolding in the background
That fire extinguisher on the right is too distracting—please remove it
Remove the SUV from the front lawn.
Those two people on the ends aren't part of our group—can you remove them and clean up the edges nicely?
Add several farmworkers wearing wide-brimmed straw hats bent over binding wheat sheaves in the field, and add two white herons flying across the sky above

Completely remove the photographer's reflected silhouette from the glass display case (including any phone/camera outline), while preserving the glass's inherent highlights and edge refraction; additionally, add a red velvet rope stanchion behind the display case (two polished brass posts connected by a draped velvet rope), positioned naturally.

Remove the student slumped over on the front left entirely, leaving the seat vacant; place an open spiral notebook and a ballpoint pen on the desk where they were, with perspective matching the desk surface, and the lighting affected by the projector glow should be realistic. Do not alter the other students or the projection screen.

Remove the red trail marker sign on the right foreground, ensuring the snow surface texture continues naturally without visible seams; then add a snowboarder executing a carving turn in the mid-ground slightly to the left, with visible snow spray and slight motion blur, their shadow must be cast correctly onto the snow surface.
Remove that photobombing guy in the neon green swim trunks from behind me, but don't blur out the wave ripples or the footprints in the sand.
Add a Starbucks-style iced Frappuccino with a whipped cream dome to my empty hand, with the straw positioned to just touch my lips.
